0.response: {"Q0":"No, I just stuck to the instruction given and tried my best at the game.  There was a pattern with the digging part, the red planet and blue planet had the same order in which to dig.  I think, lol.  But for some reason when I figured this out I started messing up more.  So I stuck with what I found works best.  It was the digging part again, I would focused on the first layer to dig up I saw and then my mind would remember what keys to press next."}

7.response: {"Q0":"That was hard cause it went by faster, it was a mix of messing up and going for the better chance to win."}

1.response: {"Q0":"As stated before I tired to find a pattern, found one, but it threw me off , so I switched back to keystroke memory. "}

5.response: {"Q0":"No, as stated before I didn't want to find those anymore so I stopped digging on the red planet cause after 3 to 5 digs I kept getting red gems and I couldn't sell them anymore. "}

6.response: {"Q0":"All the blue after the red guy left and if I clicked on all the blue i tried to get some green cause there was a chance of them being blue as well."}

8.response: {"Q0":"The digging part got me locked in, I thought that would be the most demanding task and would be the most rewarding."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Red planet guy left so the red gems were no good so I stopped digging on the red planet because I kept getting red ones on that planet."}

10.response: {"Q0":"Yes, the questions where a word was underline there are overlapping words.  Between option 3 and 4, also 7 and 8 I believe if I remember correctly."}
